turns.content: Tell me about the security audit results.

Here's a summary of the v0.3 security audit results.

## Issues Found (3 items, all resolved)

### 1. CSP Not Configured (CRITICAL) — PR #8 ✅
Content-Security-Policy headers were missing. Implemented nonce-based script-src restrictions and added frame-ancestors 'none' to prevent clickjacking.

### 2. Insufficient CORS Restrictions (HIGH) — PR #9 ✅
`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` was in place. Switched to a whitelist approach allowing only production/staging/development origins.

### 3. API Rate Limiting Not Implemented (HIGH) — PR #10 ✅
No rate limiting existed, so I implemented Token Bucket + Redis. Free: 100 req/min, Pro: 1000 req/min, Enterprise: unlimited.

## Additional Work
- Tenant isolation bug (PR #11) also fixed ✅
- All 142 tests pass, coverage at 83.2%
- 5 technical knowledge documents accumulated in knowledge/
